intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant Phucagrostis antarctica. However, if you are referring to the plant Phacelia, I can provide you with the following information:

Phacelia is a genus of flowering plants in the borage family, Boraginaceae. Phacelia antarctica is a plant native to Antarctica and is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Phacelia include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Phacelia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support immune function and alleviate respiratory issues.
